query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `studio_rooms` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `capacity` int DEFAULT 1,
  `color` varchar(20) DEFAULT '#6366f1',
  `is_active` boolean DEFAULT true,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `studio_rooms_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `equipment` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `category` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'audio',
  `serial_number` varchar(100),
  `brand` varchar(100),
  `model` varchar(100),
  `status` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'available',
  `notes` text,
  `room_id` int,
  `purchase_date` timestamp,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `equipment_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `equipment_bookings` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `equipment_id` int NOT NULL,
  `studio_booking_id` int NOT NULL,
  `notes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `equipment_bookings_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

ALTER TABLE `studio_bookings` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `room_id` int;
